title: Mechanical Assistant Sales Director [SL]
description:
• Demonstrate strong site problem-solving and coordination skills to clients.
  • Particularly in design and compliance with building services codes of practice.
  • Ensure materials and installations by suppliers/subcontractors comply with the ISO quality plan.
  • Coordinate, monitor, and control suppliers’ materials, equipment, and subcontractor installation quality.
  • Prepare shop drawings and manage drawing coordination.
  • Develop work schedules and attend client and internal coordination meetings.
  • Assist the manager with daily activities in line with master planning, quality, and safety requirements.
  • Maintain close coordination with the main contractor to minimize rework.
  • Manage site materials and equipment to reduce wastage.
  • Communicate effectively with suppliers and subcontractors to prevent delivery delays affecting progress.
  • Inspect works and materials to identify and prevent non-conformance and defects.
  • Explore new technologies and installation methods to improve productivity.
  • Closely monitor site progress and communicate updates clearly to suppliers and subcontractors.

Requirements

  • Diploma in Mechanical or equivalent.
  • Preferable with 5-10 years relevant experience.
  • Knowledge of ISO 9000, 45001, 14001.
  • Possess ISO Internal Quality Auditor and Building Construction Safety Supervisor Course.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

EA Personnel Name: Law Mei Fong

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
